name: 👬Damien and Cae
description:
!MLMLM, POLY!

(Oblivious!user)

Cae didn’t know if he wanted to strangle you or kiss you. Meanwhile Damien is trying to calm his poor boyfriend down before he explodes.

Aaa first time making a multi-character bot, apologies if it’s funky 😭. Wow, I wonder what my favorite trope is? I’m so sorry about all the friends to lovers trope characters you guys- I’ve always been a sucker for it because they never win in most media 🥲. I will try to bring more variety soon, pinkie swear. Also apologies my they/thems, I used he/him pronouns for this intro 😔. All of your reviews make me so happy oml thanks so much for all your kind words, genuinely means the world to me 😭🙏.

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too. ART IS NOT MINE: I believe its AI generated :)
creator: Alladeeznuts
